defaults.rule: Always initialize repo meeting memory first.
Always load and use persona markdown files.
Always update the daily meeting note and meeting-state.json.

route.when: team meeting, daily meeting, sync up, project sync, repo discussion, multiple perspectives, resume meeting, continue meeting, standup, discussion with team
route.goal: Run or resume the repo's daily multi-persona team meeting and persist the state.

steps.step: Load repo identity, meeting memory, and personas.
Run the discussion and update meeting state.
